ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident or incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the accident or incident */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the accident or incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the accident or incident occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator involved */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the flight */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft involved */,
  "registration" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "construction_number" TEXT /* Construction number of the aircraft */,
  "aboard" TEXT /* Number of people aboard the aircraft */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "ground_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of ground fatalities */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "phase_of_flight" TEXT /* Phase of flight during the incident */,
  "damage_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the damage to the aircraft */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the investigation */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the accident or incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the operator (e.g., Military, Commercial) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the operator */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the operator */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Investigator, Analyst, Administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related accident or incident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation report was published */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Key findings of the investigation */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations to prevent future incidents */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investigator responsible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each accident or incident
Date of the accident or incident
Time of the accident or incident
Location where the accident or incident occurred
Number of people aboard the aircraft
Reference to the type of event

Summary of the accident or incident

Contact email for inquiries about the operator
Role of the user (e.g., Investigator, Analyst, Administrator)
